display.purpose: Hero headlines on landing page. Tight tracking for impact.

body.purpose: Primary reading text, descriptions, form labels.

label.purpose: Eyebrow badges, table headers, status tags. Always uppercase.

shadows.name: glow-primary
shadows.purpose: Hover/focus state on primary buttons and active elements.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA button. Electric Lime background, dark text, glow on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #9dff2f; color: #07110a; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; min-height: 44px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #62d11f; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(157, 255, 47, 0.28); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #9dff2f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Transparent with muted text.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #b0c8db; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid rgba(137, 180, 209, 0.18); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; min-height: 44px; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: #f4fbff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #9dff2f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content container. Glass surface with subtle border.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(13, 27, 40, 0.78); border: 1px solid rgba(137, 180, 209, 0.18); border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px; color: #f4fbff; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(159, 255, 47, 0.42); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with dark background, accent border on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: #f4fbff; border: 1px solid rgba(137, 180, 209, 0.18); border-radius: 6px; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 14px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5f7688; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(159, 255, 47, 0.42); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(157, 255, 47, 0.12); } .ds-input-error { border-color: #ff3d55; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Fixed left sidebar with glass effect, collapsible.
components.css: .ds-sidebar { position: fixed; left: 0; top: 0; height: 100vh; width: 240px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15, 30, 44, 0.98), rgba(7, 17, 28, 0.95)); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-right: 1px solid rgba(137, 180, 209, 0.18); display: flex; flex-direction: column; z-index: 1000; } .ds-sidebar-brand { padding: 20px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(137, 180, 209, 0.18); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-brand-icon { width: 32px; height: 32px; display: grid; place-items: center; background: #9dff2f; color: #000; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 18px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px; margin: 0 12px; border-radius: 10px; color: #b0c8db; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: #f4fbff; } .ds-nav-item.active { background: rgba(157, 255, 47, 0.12); color: #9dff2f; }

components.name: Pricing Card
components.description: Featured pricing card with colored badge and glow effect on hover.
components.css: .ds-pricing-card { background: rgba(13, 27, 40, 0.78); border: 1px solid rgba(137, 180, 209, 0.18); border-radius: 14px; padding: 32px 24px; text-align: center; transition: border-color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s, transform 0.3s; } .ds-pricing-card:hover { border-color: rgba(157, 255, 47, 0.42); box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(157, 255, 47, 0.15); transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-pricing-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; background: rgba(157, 255, 47, 0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(157, 255, 47, 0.25); border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #9dff2f; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-pricing-value { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #f4fbff; margin: 16px 0; } .ds-pricing-value span { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #b0c8db; }

narrative.overview: This is a control room aesthetic — dark surfaces that feel like active monitors, an electric green accent that pulses through every interactive element, and a visual density that communicates performance without clutter. The system rejects bland admin templates and CRM-style dashboards. Every screen should feel like it's running on hardware, not rendered in a browser. The palette is deliberately minimal: near-black backgrounds (#050b12), one dominant accent (#9dff2f) that carries brand identity, and supporting neutrals that recede. Depth comes from glass effects on navigation and sidebar, tonal layering on cards, and glow treatments on primary actions — not from heavy shadows or decorative elements.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first with electric green accent energy (#9dff2f)
Glass effects on structural navigation, solid surfaces on content
Glow and pulse treatments for interactive states
Mobile-first responsive with desktop-complete admin flows
System status communicated through color, not icons

rules.name: The Accent Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Electric Lime appears on ≤15% of any given screen. Its power comes from concentration, not distribution.

rules.name: The Glow-Only-on-Action Rule
rules.body: Glow effects appear only on interactive states (hover, focus, active). Static elements never glow.

rules.name: The Weight-is-Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Bold (700) is for headings and labels only. Body text is always 400. Medium (500) is avoided.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows and glow appear only as response to state.

dos: Do use Electric Lime (#9dff2f) as the primary accent — it IS the brand identity.
Do keep dark backgrounds near-black (#050b12, #07111c) — the void is intentional.
Do use glass effects (backdrop-filter blur) on navigation and structural overlays only.
Do implement glow treatments on hover/focus for primary interactive elements.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — all animations disabled globally.
Do use 44px minimum touch targets on mobile for all interactive elements.
Do use weight (700 vs 400) for hierarchy, not color variation or font size alone.
Do use 14px radius for cards, 6px for buttons/inputs — the established radius scale.
donts: Don't use generic CRM-style dashboards — monochrome grays, flat tables, no personality.
Don't use spreadsheet-like data grids — Excel-in-a-browser aesthetic.
Don't use bland SaaS admin templates — sidebar + white cards + blue accents.
Don't apply gradient text (background-clip: text) — decorative, never meaningful.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as colored accent).
Don't pair border: 1px solid X with box-shadow blur ≥ 16px on the same element.
Don't use border-radius ≥ 24px on cards — the system caps at 14px.
Don't apply glassmorphism decoratively — blur is for structural navigation, not cards.
Don't animate CSS layout properties unless truly needed.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing — ease-out with exponential curves only.
